name: Kaitiaki Adventures
description: 提供世界级的罗托鲁瓦探险旅游：凯图纳河漂流（14个急流+世界最高商业漂流瀑布Tutea Falls）、河流滑板、以及塔拉韦拉火山导览徒步（唯一合法进入火山的运营商）。120%气候正效益，本地毛利人拥有和经营。中文简体书面支持。
descriptionEn: World-class adventure tourism in Rotorua: Kaituna River rafting (14 rapids + world's highest commercially rafted Tutea Falls), river sledging, and guided Mt Tarawera hikes (only operator with legal access). 120% climate positive, locally Māori-owned. Chinese (Simplified) written support available.
highlights: 凯图纳河漂流——世界最高商业漂流瀑布
河流滑板——零距离感受急流
塔拉韦拉火山独家导览
